title: Invisible Boss Bars
description: Simply hide your boss bars & just keep the text. Hide either all boss bars, only progress or just hide boss bars with 0 progress (empty)
body:
# Invisible Boss Bars A fairly simple pack to hide all boss bars and just keep the text above it. This is usually useful for servers that use the boss bar for info displays and you just want fancy floating text. If you use it for your own server try the plugin/mod [MWeb](https://modrinth.com/mod/mweb) to (force) load it for other players. ## Choose your version This pack is designed to work in all versions after the boss bar revamp update by Minecraft (so no 1.8 currently). You can choose between hiding all boss bars (all), only hiding the progress (full) or just hiding boss bars that has no progress (empty). All colors are hidden by default, to still show e.g. the purple boss bar for ender dragons you need to modify the single ``bars.png`` file inside the pack. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sRddCRho/images/a75b5b729caa36f7ff3ccd6a336c32e2a25131ac.png) **Invisible Boss Bars (all)*
Other Version Previews If you use the empty hider, progress will be displayed differently without the background. Therefore it will be invisible on no value or 0.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sRddCRho/images/40e42857eec8fbd5dec8c8e514ccfa54eb669946.png) If you use the full hider, progress will not be displayed at all. Therefore all boss bars seems to be empty but always visible.
